subcodes.first_line: The inception of utterance and the consummation thereof is the mention of the Sovereign of transcendence and the King of Glory, exalted be His grace and magnified be His bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بدایات کلام و غایات ختام ذکر سلطان عما و ملیک بهاست جل عنایته و عظم احسانه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @contention and conflict, @suffering and imprisonment
